name: Sichuan Chili Oil
steps: Toast Dried chili, Sichuan peppercorn and blitz.
In a pot on low heat combine oil with bruised garlic, bruised ginger and toasted coriander seeds.
Confit until garlic and ginger is golden brown.
Remove from heat and strain, discard garlic, ginger, coriander seeds.
Heat oil to 100-120C and add blitzed chilis.
